metadata.name: Defense Sector - Compliance and Security
metadata.description: Knowledge Graph for defense contracting compliance and security requirements

rules.subject: Controlled unclassified information (CUI)
rules.reasoning: Federal contractors must implement NIST 800-171 for CUI protection

rules.subject: CMMC compliance
rules.reasoning: Defense contractors must achieve specified CMMC maturity level

rules.subject: Access control audit
rules.reasoning: Annual access control audits required for CUI protection

rules.subject: Incident response
rules.reasoning: Security incidents involving CUI must be reported within 72 hours
